slogan: L'intelligence artificielle au service de votre beauté

layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-md mx-auto h-screen bg-white overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl shadow-black/10 flex flex-col

navigation.bottom_tab_bar: Fixed at bottom (inside the mobile container). Height h-20. Use glassmorphism (`bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E5E5EA]`). 4 items: Home, Tutorials, Looks, Profile. Active item: `#FF2D55`, Inactive: `#8E8E93`.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF2D55] text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center
buttons.floating_chat: absolute bottom-24 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-black rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] z-50 cursor-pointer text-[#FF2D55] active:scale-90 transition-transform

inputs.text_field: w-full bg-[#F2F2F7] rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF2D55] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-[#8E8E93]

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E5E5EA] p-5 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] overflow-hidden

animations.splash_screen: Use framer-motion. Animate the word 'ARIA' fading in and scaling slightly. Pink silk background texture. Fades out after 2.5 seconds to Login/Home.
animations.page_transitions: Slide horizontally like iOS push transitions (x: 20, opacity: 0 -> x: 0, opacity: 1).

views_requirements.splash_screen: Full screen overlay. Background image of pink silk. 'ARIA' in bold Outfit text (white or black depending on contrast). Includes the slogan.
views_requirements.login_register: Clean form layout. Email, Password, and a 'City' field (vital for weather API). Large primary button. iOS style clean inputs.
views_requirements.home_dashboard:
Large iOS title 'Bonjour, [Name]'. 
1. Weather Widget: Card showing current temp + city. 
2. Skin Advice: Box linked to weather (e.g., 'It is cold, hydrate your skin.'). 
3. Floating chat button bottom-right. 
4. Horizontal scroll of daily quick tips.
views_requirements.chat_modal: Opens via the floating button. Slides up like an iOS sheet (rounded-t-3xl). Contains an AI Chat interface (messages, input area). AI responds to beauty queries.
views_requirements.tutorials_page: Grid or vertical list of makeup courses. Large images with `aspect-video` and rounded-3xl. Title and duration overlaid or below.
views_requirements.saved_looks: Masonry or 2-column grid of saved beauty portraits/presets. Square or portrait aspect ratios.
views_requirements.profile: Circular avatar at top. List of settings (Account, Notifications, Beauty Preferences, Logout) using iOS style list format (bg-white, border-b between items).

media.icons: lucide-react for all UI icons (Home, Video, Heart, User, MessageCircle, Sun, CloudRain).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React Native Expo app called ARIA.
Ensure all components are styled using Tailwind/Nativewind or standard StyleSheet matching the iOS spec provided.
Use standard React Native components or Expo equivalents for Splash Screen, layout, and text.
MANDATORY: Build the floating AI Chatbox on the Home screen. It should be an absolute positioned rounded button at bottom-right.
MANDATORY: Implement the Home page with a Weather block. You can mock the weather API logic, but display a UI card showing the City (from registration), Temperature, and AI Skin Advice.
Add `testID` to all interactive elements for testing (React Native equivalent of data-testid).
Use iOS style components (squircle borders, rose-pink actions, heavy titles, Tab.Navigator).
